title: Experience the Breathtaking Svalbard

scenes.text: Svalbard is one of the northernmost inhabited places on Earth.
Located in the Arctic Ocean, Svalbard belongs to Norway.
Svalbard has more polar bears than people, making it a unique ecosystem.
The Northern Lights dance vividly across its skies.
scenes.label: NORTHERN LIGHTS

scenes.text: Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Svalbard, Arctic Ocean - Norway. An Arctic wilderness with stunning landscapes and more polar bears than humans. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
